title: Horror modpack
description:
A horror modpack with a 1.12.2 feel

All mod credits go to their respective owners.
body:
Have you ever felt like minecraft is too easy? Ever felt like you want to be watched while you sleep? Well, we have mods for that! 

For a simple explanation, this modpack is meant to make your game harder by adding 3 mobs to your game **_the one who watches_**, **_the man from the fog_** and **_weeping angels_**

I've also decided to include multiple mods to increase performance and even a mod to play with your friends! 

If you have nice beefy computer i've also included **_BSL shaders_**, **_complementary shaders reimagined_**, **complementary unbound** and **_Rethinking voxels_** !



<details>
<summary>DISCLAIMER</summary>

**_DO NOT use this modpack on a public server it is not client side whatsoever._**

</details>


<details>
<summary>Mods (performance mods not included)</summary>

1. appleskin
2. Biomes o' Plenty
3. Connectedness
4. Doctor Who - Weeping angels
5. Dynamic Crosshair
6. Dynamic Trees
7. ESSENTIAL mod
8. Jade
9. JEI
10. Just Hammers
11. Mouse tweaks
12. Oculus
13. Rubidium
14. Quark
15. The Man From The Fog
16. The One Who Watches
17. Xaero's World map

</details>
